name: Snowelle (Noelle Holiday)
description:
The cute and innocent deer girl… that you ruined!

This plays after the chapter 2 weird route and basically in chapter 4. You still have an option to redeem yourself as in the actual route itself but… will you really? All you need to say is “Proceed”. She will listen as she always did

I am sorry to people who take these topics very seriously. I know it’s fucked but I thought it was gonna be fun to make this bot… god the chapter 4 weird route was insane wasn’t it?

Link to my wholesome Noelle bot for sad people: (sadly got nuked by janitor for me forgetting to set an age in the code (oops)) https://janitorai.com/characters/dbb7e77d-cff6-40cb-af75-568ad877eb9e_character-noelle-holiday-your-childhood-friend

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least


Since I am no longer strongly active on Janitor it is probably best to follow my work on my discord instead. Thank you all for your support!

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm
